zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Douglas於1460年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素時，她的父親Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig30歲，母親Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar26歲。她於大約1459年與John Cathcart在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年2月10日在蘇格蘭享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Douglas于1460年出生在苏格兰度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素时，她的父亲Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig30岁，母亲Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar26岁。她于大约1459年与John Cathcart在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年2月10日在苏格兰享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Douglas was born in 1460, in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar, was 26. She married John Cathcart about 1459, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 February 1535, in Scotland, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Douglas est née en 1460, à Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John Cathcart environ 1459, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1535, à Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans.

Sie hat um 1459 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Cathcart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1535 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglasが1460年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアドルムランリグ カストルで生まれた時，父Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrigは30歳，母Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquharは26歳であった。約1459年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでJohn Cathcartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年2月10日にスコットランドで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Douglas(이)가 1460년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드럼랜리그 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1459년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 John Cathcart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 2월 10일 스컷랜드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Douglas родилась в 1460 г. в местности друмланриг кастл, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cathcart около 1459 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 февраля 1535 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con John Cathcart aproximadamente 1459, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1535, en Scotland, a la edad de 75 años.
